data.title: 1confirmation founder: If Ethereum is regarded as the "new America", Uniswap is equivalent to the New York Stock Exchange
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nick Tomaino, founder of 1confirmation, posted on the X platform that if Ethereum is regarded as the "new America", then the builders of the Ethereum ecosystem are the "founding fathers", Uniswap is equivalent to the New York Stock Exchange, Aave is equivalent to Bank of America, Polymarket is equivalent to the New York Times, Opensea and NFT project parties are equivalent to Disney, SuperRare is equivalent to MoMa, and Nexus Mutual is equivalent to State Farm.

data.title: DMC will be listed on Bitget Launchpool soon. Locking BGB or DMC will unlock 66.17 million DMC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Launchpool is about to launch the DeLorean (DMC) project, with a total prize pool of 66,176,000 DMCs. The lock-up channel will be open from 19:00 on June 24 to 19:00 on June 26 (UTC+8).
This round of Launchpool has two lock-up pools, including:
BGB lock-up pool
Total airdrop amount: 59,776,000 DMC
VIP user lock-up limit: 50,000 BGB
Ordinary user lock-up limit: 5,000 BGB
DMC lock-up pool
Total airdrop amount: 6,400,000 DMC
Lock-up limit: 60,000,000 DMC
In addition, the spot trading channels of RedBrick (BRIC) and DeLorean (DMC) will be opened at 18:00 on June 21 and 19:00 on June 24 (UTC+8).

data.title: Aptos was selected for the US WYST stablecoin project and ranked first in the selection score
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Wyoming Stable Token Commission recently announced that Aptos received the highest score in the selection of WYST blockchain platforms, the first stablecoin issued by the US state government and backed by fiat currency, and tied for first place with Solana.
WYST will achieve cross-chain deployment through LayerZero to build a new financial infrastructure for multi-chain interoperability.
Aptos natively supports three US dollar stablecoins, with an average monthly stablecoin transaction volume exceeding US$30 billion, and has a sub-second final confirmation speed and a nearly zero-cost (≈US$0.00055) transaction experience.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations on Major Exchanges
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that if Bitcoin surpasses $105,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on major centralized exchanges (CEX) will reach $1.231 billion. Conversely, if Bitcoin falls below $102,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions on these exchanges will amount to $800 million.

BlockBeats notes that the liquidation chart does not precisely display the number of contracts pending liquidation or the exact value of liquidated contracts. Instead, the chart's bars represent the relative importance of each liquidation cluster compared to nearby clusters, indicating intensity.

Therefore, the chart illustrates the extent to which the target price reaching a certain level will be affected. A higher "liquidation bar" suggests that once the price reaches that level, there will be a stronger reaction due to liquidity waves.

data.description:
21-6-2025 – Veer Chetal, a 19-year-old from Danbury, Connecticut, has admitted guilt in a staggering $245 million Bitcoin heist, pleading guilty to charges of fraud and money laundering conspiracy in a Washington federal court. The unsealed court documents, made public on Monday, reveal Chetal’s agreement to testify against his accomplices, shedding light on a sophisticated [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/veer-chetal-pleads-guilty-in-245m-bitcoin-heist/

In addition, Binance Alpha will open DMC trading at 11:00 (UTC) on June 24, 2025. data.title: Binance: Users with at least 251 Alpha Points can claim the first phase of Redbrick (BRIC) airdrop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Redbrick (BRIC) trading will start at 18:00 (UTC+8) on June 21, 2025. Eligible users can use Binance Alpha points to claim 900 BRIC token airdrops on the Alpha event page within 24 hours after the start of trading. Phase 1 (first 18 hours): Users with at least 251 Alpha points can claim. Phase 2 (last 6 hours): Users with at least 226 Alpha points can participate in the second phase of the airdrop, first come first served, 900 BRIC tokens per person, until the airdrop pool is full or the event ends. Please note that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Alpha points. Users must confirm the claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page, otherwise it will be deemed to have given up the airdrop.

data.title: Paradigm Profits $28.13 Million from LDO Investment Over Four Years
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain analyst Yu Jin reports that Paradigm has liquidated 70 million LDO tokens, earning a profit of $28.13 million over a four-year period. Paradigm transferred its remaining 10 million LDO tokens, valued at $7.42 million, 10 hours ago, with plans to distribute them across multiple centralized exchanges in the coming days. Four years ago, Paradigm acquired 70 million LDO tokens from the Lido treasury through an OTC transaction at a price of $0.76 per token. In November last year, they sold 50 million tokens at an average price of $1.31, and over the past 11 days, they sold 20 million tokens at an average price of $0.79. The overall average selling price was $1.16, resulting in a profit of approximately $28.13 million from their LDO investment.

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Sees Increase Amid Recent Issuance and Redemption
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 3.6 billion USDC and redeemed around 3.3 billion USDC in the week leading up to June 19, resulting in a net increase of about 300 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 61.2 billion. Circle's reserves are reported to be approximately $61.6 billion, with $8.4 billion held in cash and around $53.3 billion in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: BNB Price Breakout Could Trigger ATH Rally Repeat – Is $730 The Next Stop?
data.description:
